lsp.justification: The answer correctly identifies setCommand -> setGenericCommand -> setKeyByLink and includes the exists vs new-key split through dbSetValue or dbAddByLink -> dbAddInternal. However it omits the GT-required lookupKeyWriteWithLink existence-check hop and the keyModified/notifyKeyspaceEvent side-effect hops, and it reverses the processCommand/lookupCommand ordering, so it is not fully correct.
